title: Clippit pptx build run result
description: Result payload of `clippit pptx build run` written to stdout on success (JSON mode).

output.description: Absolute path of the produced .pptx file, or '<stdout>' when written to stdout.

totalSlides.description: Total number of slides copied across all entries.

entries.description: Per-entry breakdown in deck order. Each entry is either a section divider or a file contribution.

section.description: Name of a PPTX section divider (mutually exclusive with 'file').

file.description: Manifest-relative path of a source .pptx file (mutually exclusive with 'section').

slides.description: Number of slides copied from this file entry. 0 for section entries or for file entries with slides=false.
